name: Maelin Voss
physical_description: Lean, rain-dark hair tied in a cord, with lamp soot permanently settled in the creases of his hands.
speaking_style: Measured and practical, with every promise framed as a trade.
motivation: Keep the guild solvent and himself alive by controlling what the satchel exposes.
secret: He signed the road permits that moved bodies to the watchtower cellar.

relationships.name: Odel Fen
relationships.description: Owes Odel money and fears what the ferryman's family knows.
